chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. 1st Appeal No. 49 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on CMA 2080/2025. 2. For orders on CMA 2081/2025. 3. For orders on CMA 2082/2025. 4. For orders on CMA 2083/2025. 5. For hearing of main case. 24.11.2025. None present for appellant. = This matter has been listed for hearing for the last several dates however, none have been present on behalf of the appellant. It appears that none are present today. A perusal of the exparte judgment suggests that the same was decided after the leave to defend orders were granted by the 7th Additional District Judge, Hyderabad yet the conditionality of the orders was not complied by the appellant Sunny s/o Chand Babu and the matter therefore, proceeded exparte against him. I do not find any legal defect in the said impugned order. Accordingly, this 1st appeal is dismissed alogwith pending applications. JUDGE Tufail
